data.title: Lancaster Resources appoints Ross Brown as VP, Exploration for Lake Cargelligo Gold Project amid record gold prices.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on September 12, 2025, Lancaster Resources Inc. shared that Ross Brown has been named the Vice President of Exploration for the company. Operating under the symbols CSE:LCR | OTC:LANRF | FRA:6UF0, Lancaster is focusing on advancing its primary project, the Lake Cargelligo Gold Project located in New South Wales, Australia. This appointment signifies a strategic move to drive progress in the exploration efforts for the project and enhance Lancaster's presence within the region.

data.title: OTG Acquisition Corp. I prices $200M public offering of 20M units at $10 each on Nasdaq (OTGAU), trading starts Sept 12.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, OTG Acquisition Corp. I, a special purpose acquisition company trading under Nasdaq as OTGAU, disclosed the pricing for its initial public offering. The company revealed the offering of 20,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market with the ticker symbol “OTGAU” from the same day. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Following the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be traded on Nasdaq with the symbols “OTGA” and “OTGAW” respectively.

data.title: Sable Resources Ltd. receives $5 million payment from OR Royalties Inc, totaling $8.8 million from royalty sale. Further $2 million possible.
data.description: Sable Resources Ltd. in Vancouver, British Columbia, has received a $5 million payment from OR Royalties Inc. related to the TDG Gold Corp. royalty sold to OR, agreement made public on April 24, 2025. This payment, part of the Sable-OR Investment Agreement, follows TDG's drill results at the Greater Shasta-Newberry project, surpassing the Discovery Milestone specified in the agreement. Sable has now received a total of $8.8 million from OR, including this recent payment. An additional $2 million may be received if OR opts for another 1% royalty on Sable’s properties in British Columbia – Copper Queen, Copper Prince, and Core Mountain.

data.title: Kinaxis partners with Workday to merge supply chain, finance, workforce planning with AI-enabled framework, aiding decisions.
data.description: In Ottawa, Ontario, Kinaxis Inc. (TSX: KXS), a prominent figure in AI supply chain coordination, revealed a fresh collaboration with Workday. This partnership merges an AI-driven, agentic structure within Kinaxis Maestro® and Workday Adaptive Planning. The integration aims to offer customers a cohesive perspective of their operational, financial, and personnel information, facilitating quicker and more assured decision-making. In the current landscape of escalating disruption and ambiguity, various essential functions continue to function in isolation.

data.title: Indiana-based Intrepid Phoenix Ventures collaborates with Indiana University for a Department of Defense SBIR Phase I Grant focused on addiction recovery with generative AI.
data.description: Intrepid Phoenix Ventures, Inc., a corporation located in Mishawaka, Indiana, has recently secured a Department of Defense (DoD) SBIR Phase I Grant from the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office (CDAO). The grant aims to support the company's innovative research and development project, "Generative AI for Addiction Recovery: Enhancing Personalized Engagement, Outcomes, and Predictive Relapse Prevention." This initiative focuses on utilizing data-intensive technologies to improve addiction recovery processes.

data.title: JCPenney offers exceptional weekly deals showcased during Amazon Prime Video's football program, attracting customers.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, JCPenney has announced a new strategy to showcase its exclusive weekly deals, which will be revealed during Amazon's football broadcasts on Prime Video. This collaboration aims to provide customers with unique savings opportunities each week.

data.title: ETH soars to $4,513 (+1.94%) post SharpLink's $3.7B investment, indicating bullish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ETH is currently trading at $4,513, representing a 1.94% increase. This surge follows SharpLink's significant investment of $3.7 billion in their treasury allocation. Technical analysis indicates a bullish trend, with the price maintaining momentum above crucial support levels.

data.title: Invitation Homes declares $0.29/share quarterly dividend for stockholders, payable by October 17, 2025.
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share on its common stock (NYSE: INVH). This dividend will be paid on or before October 17, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 25, 2025. Invitation Homes, the top single-family home leasing and management company in the US, focuses on providing quality housing solutions.

EU Commission: ‘We have released an extra €40 million to support Ukrainians facing a fourth winter amid Russia's aggression. Boosting winter readiness and civilian protection, aid includes shelter materials and improved access to water, sanitation and heating.’

data.title: JP Morgan launches tokenized carbon credit platform on blockchain, improving transparency. Trials with S&P Global underway. Web3 disrupting carbon markets with increased efficiency and trust. Instituitional interest rising. Source: Grandview Research.(Token count: 238)
data.description: JP Morgan Chase has launched a tokenized carbon credit platform using blockchain technology, aiming to improve transparency in voluntary markets plagued by opacity. The system will allow for tracking of credits from issuance to retirement, enhancing trust, efficiency, and transparency in trading. Trials are ongoing with firms like S&P Global Commodity Insights. This move into Web3 aligns with the trend of real world asset tokenization, attracting institutions like Blackrock and Deutsche Bank. The initiative aims to streamline settlement for various instruments and enhance trust in carbon markets. Each carbon credit represents one metric tonne, and the platform is seen as a disruptor promising better price visibility, liquidity, and a globally compatible framework to amplify participation in carbon markets. JP Morgan sees a unique opportunity in this asset class to digitize and standardize systems.

data.title: BNB price surges near all-time high at $907.27, with RSI 65.57 and MACD indicating strong bullish signals. Key resistances breached.
data.description: The Binance Coin is currently being traded at $907.27, which is close to its highest value in the past 52 weeks. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 65.57, indicating a positive market sentiment. Additionally, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is showing bullish momentum. This surge in value is attributed to BNB surpassing significant resistance levels.

data.title: Bitcoin reaches $115,000 with 0.83% gains; mid-sized whales accumulate 3.65M coins, showing returning institutional trust post volatility.
data.description: The price of BTC has surged to $115,000, recording a daily increase of 0.83%. This rise in value is accompanied by mid-sized whales amassing more than 3.65 million coins, indicating a growing trust from institutional investors despite the recent market fluctuations.

data.title: Ellomay Capital sets 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on Oct 23 at 3:00 p.m. in Tel Aviv, Israel.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Ellomay Capital Ltd. disclosed plans for its annual general meeting of shareholders scheduled for October 23, 2025. The meeting will take place at the Company’s offices located at 18 Rothschild Boulevard, 1st Floor, Tel Aviv 6688121, Israel, starting at 3:00 p.m. Israel time. Ellomay, a leading renewable energy and power generator with projects in Europe, Israel, and the USA, trades on the NYSE American and TASE under the ticker symbol ELLO. This event is pivotal for shareholders and will be subject to possible adjournment or postponement.
